title: PRIMA 1 Litre Stainless Steel Flask with Carry Handle
features: Stainless steel vacuum insulated flask with a free carry Case to keep the Contents warm
Lightweight, virtually unbreakable stainless steel construction
Keeps hot for up to 8 hours and cold for up to 24 hours
Free Carry Pouch To keep The contents Hot
description: Product Description The ideal item for work or day trips. Keep You tea hot with this flask Specifications • Made from 18/8 stainless steel • Features an unbreakable liner and case • Vacuum insulated • Retains hot liquid (97 deg.C) for 24 hours (52 deg.C) • Retains cold liquid (2 deg.C) for 24 hours (12 deg.C) • Plastic lined insulated stainless steel cup • Easy to clean - rust free - no odour • Leak proof stopper • Height: 280mm, Diameter: 90mm (approx) • Box dimension: H 300mm x W 115mm x D 115mm Box Contains 1 x flask
